mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_org_unit (unit_name, unit_code, status, admin_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{unitName}, #{unitCode}, #{status}, #{adminUserId}, #{createTime})
INSERT INTO sys_unit (id, unit_name, unit_code, status, admin_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{unitName}, #{unitCode}, #{status}, #{adminUserId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.unit_name, u.unit_code, u.status, u.admin_user_id, admin.username AS admin_username, admin.real_name AS admin_real_name, loc.id AS attendance_location_id, loc.location_name AS attendance_location_name, loc.address AS attendance_location_address, loc.longitude AS attendance_location_longitude, loc.latitude AS attendance_location_latitude, loc.radius_meters AS attendance_location_radius_meters, loc.status AS attendance_location_status, u.create_time FROM sys_org_unit u LEFT JOIN sys_user admin ON admin.id = u.admin_user_id AND admin.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN attendance_location loc ON loc.unit_id = u.id ORDER BY u.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE unit_id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, unit_id, location_name, latitude, longitude, radius_meters, address, status, create_time, create_time AS update_time FROM attendance_location WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_location SET location_name = #{locationName}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, radius_meters = #{radiusMeters}, address = #{address}, status = #{status} WHERE unit_id = #{unitId}
